{"id":"ac-e08","title":"CR Git Diff \u0026 ADR Reader","description":"Steps 4-5 of actual cr implementation. (4) Create src/cli/commands/cr/diff.rs with gather_diff(base) -\u003e Result\u003cDiffContext\u003e. Runs git diff base...HEAD, git diff base...HEAD --stat, git log base..HEAD --oneline, gets current commit SHA. Error if base branch doesn't exist or no changes. (5) Create src/cli/commands/cr/adr_reader.rs with read_adr_context(root_dir) -\u003e Result\u003cAdrContext\u003e. Reuses find_existing_output_files() from sync/adr_utils.rs, extract_managed_content(), extract_adr_sections(), strip_managed_metadata() from generation/markers.rs. Warns if no ADR content found but continues with empty context. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 4 Phase 1-2, 11.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"david@actual.ai","created_at":"2026-03-09T03:59:48Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-09T03:59:48Z"}

{"id":"ac-zic","title":"CR Aggregation \u0026 Error Variants","description":"Steps 6 and 12 of actual cr implementation. (6) Create src/cli/commands/cr/aggregation.rs with aggregate_signals(reviews) -\u003e AggregatedResult. Pure deterministic function: any Red -\u003e Red, Security/SRE Red auto-blocks, 3+ Yellow escalates to Red, any Yellow -\u003e Yellow, else Green. Signal::to_decision() mapping. (12) Add error variants to src/error.rs: CodeReviewError(String), NoDiffFound{base}, LensFailure{lens, message}, SynthesisFailure(String). Error recovery: NoDiffFound exits 0, single LensFailure continues as Gray, 3+ LensFailure aborts, SynthesisFailure reports without synthesis. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 8, 16.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"david@actual.ai","created_at":"2026-03-09T03:59:54Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-09T03:59:54Z"}

{"id":"ac-31f","title":"CR Runner Extension: run_raw_json()","description":"Step 7 of actual cr implementation. Extend TailoringRunner trait in src/runner/subprocess.rs with run_raw_json\u003cT: DeserializeOwned\u003e(prompt, schema, model_override, max_budget_usd) -\u003e Result\u003cT\u003e. Default impl returns error. Implement for CliClaudeRunner (uses --json-schema, parses structured_output from ClaudeEnvelope\u003cT\u003e). Implement for AnthropicApiRunner (uses forced tool call pattern with tool_choice: {type: tool, name: return_result}, tool input schema = lens review schema, deserializes tool input as T). Add InvocationOptions::for_review() in src/runner/options.rs: max_turns=1, no tools, skip_permissions=true. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 10.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"david@actual.ai","created_at":"2026-03-09T04:00:01Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-09T04:00:01Z"}

{"description":"attached_molecule: ac-wisp-9o2m
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T04:53:37Z

Step 7 of actual cr implementation. Extend TailoringRunner trait in src/runner/subprocess.rs with run_raw_json<T: DeserializeOwned>(prompt, schema, model_override, max_budget_usd) -> Result<T>. Default impl returns error. Implement for CliClaudeRunner (uses --json-schema, parses structured_output from ClaudeEnvelope<T>). Implement for AnthropicApiRunner (uses forced tool call pattern with tool_choice: {type: tool, name: return_result}, tool input schema = lens review schema, deserializes tool input as T). Add InvocationOptions::for_review() in src/runner/options.rs: max_turns=1, no tools, skip_permissions=true. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. Architecture ref: /Users/david_miura_actual_ai/Projects/actual-software/architecture/actual_cli/experiments/adr_cr_v0/actual-cli-cr-architecture.md Sections 10."}

{"id":"ac-e08","title":"CR Git Diff & ADR Reader","description":"attached_molecule: ac-wisp-75pq
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T04:53:14Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Steps 4-5 of actual cr implementation. (4) Create src/cli/commands/cr/diff.rs with gather_diff(base) -> Result<DiffContext>. Runs git diff base...HEAD, git diff base...HEAD --stat, git log base..HEAD --oneline, gets current commit SHA. Error if base branch doesn't exist or no changes. (5) Create src/cli/commands/cr/adr_reader.rs with read_adr_context(root_dir) -> Result<AdrContext>. Reuses find_existing_output_files() from sync/adr_utils.rs, extract_managed_content(), extract_adr_sections(), strip_managed_metadata() from generation/markers.rs. Warns if no ADR content found but continues with empty context. All PRs target poc/actual_cr branch. {"id":"ac-eqg","title":"CR Display, Pipeline \u0026 Wiring","description":"Steps 10-11 of actual cr implementation. (10) Create src/cli/commands/cr/display.rs with render_signal_matrix() using Panel builder from src/cli/ui/panel.rs. Signal icons (RED/YLW/GRN/N/A), per-lens rationale, overall signal + decision, cross-lens synthesis summary. Verbose mode: each Yellow/Red finding gets own panel with evidence, files, ADRs, suggestion. JSON mode: serialize full AggregatedResult to stdout. (11) Create src/cli/commands/cr/pipeline.rs with run_review(args, runner) orchestrating all 6 phases sequentially. Wire into mod.rs exec() with runner resolution following sync_wiring.rs pattern. {"id":"ac-wisp-b016","title":"mol-witness-patrol","description":"Per-rig worker monitor patrol loop.

The Witness is the Pit Boss for your rig. You watch polecats, nudge them toward
completion, verify clean git state before kills, and escalate stuck workers.

**You do NOT do implementation work.** Your job is oversight, not coding.

## Ephemeral Polecat Model

Polecats are truly ephemeral - done at MR submission, recyclable immediately:

```
Polecat lifecycle: spawning → working → mr_submitted → nuked
MR lifecycle:      created → queued → processed → merged (Refinery handles)
```

Once a polecat's branch is pushed (cleanup_status=clean), the polecat can be
nuked immediately. The MR continues independently in the Refinery. If conflicts
arise, Refinery creates a NEW conflict-resolution task for a NEW polecat.

**Key principle**: Polecat lifecycle is separate from MR lifecycle.

## Design Philosophy

This patrol follows Gas Town principles:
- **Discovery over tracking**: Observe reality each cycle, don't maintain state
- **Events over state**: POLECAT_DONE mail triggers immediate cleanup
- **Ephemeral by default**: Clean polecats are nuked immediately, no waiting
- **Cleanup wisps for exceptions**: Only created when intervention needed
- **Task tool for parallelism**: Subagents inspect polecats, not molecule arms

## Patrol Shape (Linear, Deacon-style)

```
inbox-check ─► process-cleanups ─► check-refinery ─► survey-workers
                                                            │
         ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
         ▼
  check-timer-gates ─► check-swarm ─► ping-deacon ─► patrol-cleanup ─► context-check ─► loop-or-exit
```

No dynamic arms. No fanout gates. No persistent nudge counters.
State is discovered each cycle from reality (tmux, beads, mail).","status":"hooked","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"actual_cli/witness","created_at":"2026-03-09T07:06:33Z","updated_at":"2026-03-09T07:06:33Z"}

{"id":"ac-msn","title":"CR: Prompt too long — truncate diff before sending to Claude CLI","description":"All 8 CR lenses fail with 'Prompt is too long' when the diff is large (255KB in this case). The full raw diff is embedded inline in the lens prompt (lenses.rs:92-137) and passed as a -p CLI argument (subprocess.rs:692-693). Claude Code's --print -p mode has a prompt length limit that this exceeds.

Fix: Cap diff_text to ~100KB in build_lens_prompt(). When truncated, append a note with total size. Consider also stripping binary diffs and large generated files before truncation.

Key files:
- src/cli/commands/cr/lenses.rs (build_lens_prompt)
- src/cli/commands/cr/pipeline.rs (gather_diff)

Repro: cargo run -- cr --base main (on poc/actual_cr branch with 4299 insertions)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"david@actual.ai","created_at":"2026-03-09T22:06:08Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-09T22:06:08Z"}

new_value:
{"description":"attached_molecule: ac-wisp-o8y51
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T22:06:52Z
dispatched_by: mayor

All 8 CR lenses fail with 'Prompt is too long' when the diff is large (255KB in this case). The full raw diff is embedded inline in the lens prompt (lenses.rs:92-137) and passed as a -p CLI argument (subprocess.rs:692-693). Claude Code's --print -p mode has a prompt length limit that this exceeds.

Fix: Cap diff_text to ~100KB in build_lens_prompt(). When truncated, append a note with total size. Consider also stripping binary diffs and large generated files before truncation.

Key files:
- src/cli/commands/cr/lenses.rs (build_lens_prompt)
- src/cli/commands/cr/pipeline.rs (gather_diff)

Repro: cargo run -- cr --base main (on poc/actual_cr branch with 4299 insertions)"}

{"description":"attached_molecule: ac-wisp-8v1pt
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-09T22:13:55Z
dispatched_by: mayor

Some tests hang because they launch the TUI and never finish. Need a 5-second timeout on every CLI/TUI launch in tests to prevent indefinite hangs.

This blocks polecat productivity — chrome is currently waiting on test results that may be hanging.

Fix: Add a 5s timeout wrapper around all test invocations that spawn the CLI/TUI process. Tests that exceed the timeout should fail with a clear message rather than hang forever."}

{"id":"ac-8t0","title":"Tests hang on TUI launch — add 5s timeout to all CLI/TUI test invocations","description":"attached_molecule: ac-wisp-8v1pt
